front: Painting: photorealistic vanitas still life incorporating photographs of Marilyn Monroe; candlestick reflects the image of James Dean
Painting: vanitas painting juxtaposing an hourglass, candle, calendar, tarot cards, lipstick, and skull; a modern memento mori
Artist: American photorealist painter known for vanitas still lifes; associated with Chuck Close and Richard Estes

Artist: photorealist whose vanitas series was partly inspired by David Bailly's Dutch Golden Age paintings; featured as one of the few color photographs in Mary Beth Edelson's Some Living American Women Artists collage
